properties.description: Supplies semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
Semiconductor capital equipment and equipment service activities.
Designs chips but outsources wafer fabrication.
Chip design, EDA, and licensable semiconductor IP activities.
Manufactures wafers for external customers.
Wafer fabrication and front-end semiconductor manufacturing activities.
Provides outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services.
Provides semiconductor packaging or advanced packaging capability.
Provides outsourced semiconductor test services.
Assembly, packaging, and test activities after wafer fabrication.
Integrated device manufacturer with internal fabrication capability.
Provides electronic design automation software.
Supplies process chemicals or wet chemicals used in semiconductor manufacturing.
Process chemicals, gases, targets, slurries, and related material inputs.
Produces memory products such as DRAM or NAND.
Licenses semiconductor IP blocks or cores.
